data.body: Investigation complete: Bug is fully mitigated through 3 defense-in-depth layers: (1) per-worktree-review-commit.md instructs WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR export, (2) record-review.sh skips overlap check for --findings-file override, (3) harvest-worktree.sh uses --attest mode bypassing findings pipeline. No remaining code path exposes the original bug. Closing as already-fixed.
